The '''''Cobra''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that belonged to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Calrissian had many stories of how he acquired the ship and wasn't sure which one he liked the best.<ref name="Card-SWGTCG-Cobra">{{SWGTCG|set=Agents of Deception|cardname=Cobra}}</ref>

==Characteristics==
The [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was a modified [[Mu-2 long range shuttle]] originally manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]].

==History==
[[File:Lady_Luck_Cobra_Title.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Calrissian wagers his title against an Idiot's Array.]]
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Calrissian]] used it as part of his wager to [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] [[Dominic Raynor]] in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game, losing the ''Cobra'' in a game rigged by [[Barpotomous Drebble/Legends|Barpotomous Drebble]], but then later winning it back. At this time, the ''Cobra'' was notable enough for Raynor to request it by name when Lando proposed to wager a ship in their game.<ref name="Lady Luck">{{Tales|3|Lady Luck (comic story)}}</ref>

Calrissian later flew the ship off of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] while faking his own [[Death/Legends|death]] in order to uncover a plot to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] him. He then traveled to the [[Yucrales sector/Legends|Yucrales sector]] and the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Quilken/Legends|Quilken]] with it while being chased by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Thune (bounty hunter)|Thune]].<ref name="Lando Calrissian: Idiot's Array">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/fiction/f20080522/index.html|text="Lando Calrissian: Idiot's Array"|int=Lando Calrissian: Idiot's Array|newhost=Suvudu}}</ref>

Nearly three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, Calrissian and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] flew the ''Cobra'' to [[Arcan IV]] during their search for [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] was captured by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="Star Wars 79">[[Star Wars (1977) 79|''Star Wars'' (1977) 79]]</ref>

Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Calrissian used the ''Cobra'' on diplomatic missions to [[Drogheda/Legends|Drogheda]]<ref name="Star Wars 83">[[Star Wars (1977) 83|''Star Wars'' (1977) 83]]</ref> and [[Keyorin]].<ref name="Star Wars 85">[[Star Wars (1977) 85|''Star Wars'' (1977) 85]]</ref>

He later met up with Solo and Chewbacca on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], during one of the earliest incidents of the [[Nagai–Tof War]]. After the heroes crushed the [[Slavery/Legends|slaving]] operation led by [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] commander [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife|Ozrei "Knife" N'takkilomandrife]], the Nagai stole the ''Cobra'' and fled.<ref name="Star Wars 91">[[Star Wars (1977) 91|''Star Wars'' (1977) 91]]</ref> The ship was later recovered after Knife was captured on [[Kabray]].<ref name="Star Wars 95">[[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]]</ref><ref name="Star Wars 97">[[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]]</ref>

Calrissian and Chewbacca flew the ''Cobra'' together again on a mission to [[Stenos/Legends|Stenos]] to retrieve the [[Dancing Goddess/Legends|Dancing Goddess]] from [[Barpotomous Drebble/Legends|Barpotomous Drebble]]. They then delivered it to [[Godo]] to [[Mission to Godo|save]] the [[Godoan/Legends|natives]] from the [[Godoan's disease]].<ref name="Star Wars 99">[[Star Wars (1977) 99|''Star Wars'' (1977) 99]]</ref>

Calrissian flew the ''Cobra'' as [[Gold Leader/Legends|Gold Leader]] during the [[Second Battle of Endor]], the first major engagement of the Nagai-Tof War.<ref name="Star Wars 100">[[Star Wars (1977) 100|''Star Wars'' (1977) 100]]</ref>

Calrissian and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] later used the ''Cobra'' to travel to [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]], intending to inform the [[Iskalonian]] people of [[Kiro]]'s death.<ref name="Star Wars 102">[[Star Wars (1977) 102|''Star Wars'' (1977) 102]]</ref>
